content.en:
The ninetieth boundary river that has just been opened up is not too stable, and it will take some time to gestation, but at least it will not collapse.

Moreover, once the Boundary River was created, it would be a part of the Origin Boundary Sea, and even if a Ten-Realm level master wanted to destroy a Boundary River, it would be very difficult to do so.

Therefore, it is very safe for the Ten Realm-level Masters to stay in their own Boundary River, and many Ten Realm-level Masters will build their Boundary River into a strong fortress as their lair.

And the same is true for Ye Tian.

He was going to relocate a part of the Terrans to the Ninetieth Boundary River, and let the most prosperous area be occupied by the Terrans to practice there.

Of course.

Ye Tian would not give up the Void Region, which was the place of origin of the human race.

After a period of time, the ninetieth Boundary River was completely stabilized, and Ye Tian was also ready to use this Boundary River to improve his strength.

As the pioneer of this boundary river, Ye Tian was able to use the power of the boundary river to improve his strength, and it was an all-round improvement, which was also the reason why the Nine Realm-level controllers could break the shackles with the help of opening up the boundary river.

this day.

Ye Tian sat cross-legged in the origin of the Boundary River of the Ninetieth Boundary River, and began to absorb the power of the entire Boundary River.

How vast the entire Boundary River is, and how terrifying the forces that are now gathered.

Bang!!!!

Endless power surged in, and began to refine Ye Tian's body, and the power of will, primordial-level control, and control were all rapidly improving.

This kind of ascension seems to come naturally, and there is no shackle at all.

Ye Tian's strength is constantly improving, and the speed of improvement is very fast.

Of course, Ye Tian didn't expect this ascension to be comparable to the eighth layer of the Primal Tower, but at least it was at the top level among the seventh layer, so it would be fine.

Time passes, and time flies.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian had been cultivating tens of millions of Boundary Rivers in the Ninetieth Boundary River for tens of millions of years.

At this time, the power of the Ninetieth Boundary River was no longer of use to him.

"The benefits of opening up the boundary river have been exhausted, and this road is over!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the past, the Ten Realm-level Masters had come to this point, and if they wanted to continue to progress, they had to find treasures that could enhance the Will of the Transformation Realm and the Primordial-level Control Body, as well as continuously absorb the origin of the Refining Origin Realm Sea, and improve their strength step by step, as long as the assimilation level of the body did not exceed seventy percent, they would frantically absorb and refine it, and all the way to the extreme of the Ten Realm-level Masters.

That's the only way!

But now there is one more way to break the chains, and the prospects are great.

During this period of time, Ye Tian had also accumulated some primordial black qi, all of which had been obtained from other eternal controllers, with a total of twenty-three wisps of primordial black qi.

He has never been useful, but now it works.

After breaking through to the Ten Realms level master, Ye Tian found that it seemed to be easier for him to break the shackles and chains.

Time passed, after consuming a large amount of Life White Stone, and also consuming thirteen wisps of primordial black qi, Ye Tian finally broke a shackle chain again.

Click!!!!

The tenth shackle chain shattered, turning into golden energy and pouring into Ye Tian's body, elevating his primordial-level control body.

"I've improved a little more, Shizun said that if you continue to break the shackles and chains like this, and after breaking the thirty-six shackles and chains, you can break the boundaries of the Ten Realms-level controllers and reach the level of Shizun!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, absorbing the Origin Realm Sea Origin Origin also had to continue, he had a lot of Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid, so he didn't need to worry about the assimilation of the body's origin for a long time.

Time flies.

Unconsciously, another 300 million realm river years had passed, and at this time, Ye Tian had already broken the sixteen shackles and chains.

In addition, he absorbed the endless Origin Realm Sea Origin, so his strength skyrocketed.

Now, he already has the strength to break through the eighth layer of the Primal Tower.

In other words, among the Ten Realm-level controllers, his strength is at the middle level, and he may have surpassed his fourth senior sister Snow Girl controller, and is on par with the ancient demon senior brother.

However, at this time his life white stone was exhausted.

Without the Life White Stone, even if there was a lot of primordial black qi, he couldn't break the shackles.

So, he had to go and collect the Life White Stone again.

It's a pity that there are not many life white stones in Tianhuhai, and he has been there a few times during the period and harvested some, but now I am afraid that he has found many pieces, and the sparse one or two pieces are too wasteful of time.

"We have to find a new life white stone!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

And at the end of the realm, which is not too far away from the Origin Realm Sea, I am afraid that there is no good place to have a lot of Life White Stones, although it can also be found, but it takes a lot of time, and it is impossible to find too many Life White Stones at once.

He wanted to go to a place where he could quickly find a lot of Life White Stone, but he also knew it would be difficult.

"I have to go and ask the master!"

Ye Tian decided.

In Wanyuan Mountain, no matter who it is, as long as anyone breaks through to the Ten Realms level controller, they can get a chance from the Ten Elements Ancestor, but Ye Tian has never gone.

Now, he wants to go.

......

Wanyuan Mountain.

Ye Tianlai asked to see the Ten Elements Ancestor, and soon the Ten Elements Ancestor let him pass.

"Master!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Ye Tian, you are very good, you are already second only to your senior brother Gu Demon, in terms of talent, you are the highest among my many disciples. The Ten Elements Ancestor praised.

"I'm just lucky!"

Ye Tian said.

"Luck is also a talent!" said the Ten Elements Ancestor with a smile.

Ye Tian can't deny it, it seems that this is indeed the case, luck is also talent!

"Tell me, what are you looking for me?" asked the Ten Elements Ancestor.

Ye Tian immediately explained his intentions, "Master, I can ask for a great opportunity if I break through to the Ten Realms level controller, I am short of Life White Stones now, so I want a place where I can find a large number of Life White Stones. "

The Ten Elements Ancestor was surprised: "Are you sure you want such a big opportunity, you can ask for a better opportunity!"

"Master, I want this!"

Ye Tian said.

The Ten Elements Ancestor was silent for a moment, and then said, "Okay, since you insist, I'll tell you." In the area of the end of the realm that you know, there are not many life white stones, and in the end of the realm area that you can hardly reach, there are many life white stones born in some places, of course, if you go to look for it, you will definitely not find it, and you can open up a passage for the teacher to let people pass. "

"Thank you, Master!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

......
